# Clippy — Real-time Twitch Stream Intelligence API
> Detects chat spikes, classifies moments with AI, and auto-clips highlights. Pay-per-use via MPP — no API keys, no signup.

Base URL: https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app

## How it works

1. Firehose ingests Twitch chat across all channels in real-time via websocket.
2. Per-channel rate tracking detects spikes (5s burst vs 30s baseline). Only channels with 3000+ viewers trigger spike events.
3. On watched channels, Claude classifies the mood (hype, funny, rage, clutch, awkward, wholesome, drama, shock, sad) and describes what happened in one sentence.
4. Every spike on a watched channel auto-creates a Twitch clip. The AI description becomes the clip title.
5. All paid endpoints use Tempo MPP — agents pay with USDC on Tempo chain. No API keys needed.

## Free Endpoints (no payment required)

- GET /api — Service info, all endpoints with prices
- GET /health — Status: connected, channel count, msg/s
- GET /trending — Top 10 channels by chat burst rate
- GET /alerts — SSE stream of real-time spike events. Query param: ?channel=name to filter
- GET /channel-stats/:name — Live channel stats (rate, burst, baseline, vibe, viewers)
- GET /moments/:id — Get a specific captured moment by ID (includes chatSnapshot, mood, clipUrl)
- GET /moments/latest/:channel — Most recent moment for a channel
- GET /moments/:id/classify — Trigger LLM classification on a moment (returns mood + description)
- GET /clip/:id — Embeddable clip page with Twitch player at the spike timestamp

## Paid Endpoints (MPP charge per request)

- POST /trending ($0.001) — Full trending list with custom limit. Body: {"limit": 20}
- POST /channel ($0.001) — Full stats for one channel including recent messages. Body: {"channel": "caseoh_"}
- POST /spikes ($0.002) — All channels currently spiking, enriched with VOD timestamps. Body: {"withinMinutes": 5}
- POST /summarize ($0.01) — LLM-powered summary of channel chat (sentiment, topics). Body: {"channel": "caseoh_"}
- POST /moments ($0.001) — List captured spike moments. Body: {"channel": "caseoh_", "clipWorthyOnly": true, "limit": 20}

## Session Endpoint (streaming payment)

- POST /watch/:channel ($0.03/spike) — SSE stream with LLM-classified spikes + auto-clipping. Opens payment channel, $0.03 deducted per spike via off-chain voucher. Unused deposit refunded on close. Auto-closes ~2 min after stream goes offline.

## Watchlist (controls auto-clipping, free)

- POST /watch-clip/:channel — Add channel to auto-clip watchlist (enables LLM classification + Twitch clipping)
- DELETE /watch-clip/:channel — Remove from watchlist
- GET /watch-clip — List watched channels

## Channel Tracking (lightweight rate tracking, free)

- POST /track/:channel — Start tracking a channel's chat rate
- DELETE /track/:channel — Stop tracking

## Twitch Auth + Clips

- GET /auth/twitch — OAuth flow to connect Twitch account (enables clip creation)
- POST /clip/:id — Manually create a Twitch clip for a captured moment

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install tempo CLI
curl -fsSL https://tempo.xyz/install.sh | sh
tempo wallet login

# See what's trending (free)
tempo request https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/trending

# Get channel stats (pays $0.001)
tempo request -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"channel": "caseoh_"}' \
  https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/channel

# Listen for spikes on a channel (free SSE)
curl -N https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/alerts?channel=caseoh_

# Watch a channel with AI classification ($0.03/spike)
tempo request -X POST \
  https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/watch/caseoh_

# Get latest moment
tempo request https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/moments/latest/caseoh_
```

## Spike Event Format (from /alerts or /watch)

```json
{
  "type": "spike",
  "channel": "caseoh_",
  "viewers": 54800,
  "burst": 21.6,
  "baseline": 12.7,
  "jumpPercent": 70,
  "mood": "funny",
  "description": "Chat erupted after streamer rage quit and blamed the controller",
  "clipWorthy": true,
  "vodTimestamp": "2h19m19s",
  "vodUrl": "https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2730908290?t=2h19m19s",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-25T04:15:00.000Z"
}
```

## Moment Format (from /moments endpoints)

```json
{
  "id": 19,
  "channel": "caseoh_",
  "jumpPercent": 160,
  "mood": "funny",
  "description": "Chat spammed LOL after streamer fell off the map",
  "clipUrl": "https://clips.twitch.tv/ImportantHyperTapirKeepo-CZO4e0KlJ14f7ljI",
  "vodTimestamp": "1h42m10s",
  "vodUrl": "https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2730908290?t=1h42m10s",
  "chatSnapshot": ["user1: LMAOOO", "user2: NO WAY", "user3: KEKW"],
  "clipWorthy": true,
  "vibe": "funny",
  "burst": 21.6,
  "baseline": 12.7
}
```

## Payment

All paid endpoints use Tempo MPP (https://mpp.dev). Two models:
- Charge: agent sends request, gets 402, pays USDC on Tempo chain, gets response. One tx per request.
- Session: agent deposits USDC into escrow, $0.03 deducted per spike via off-chain voucher, unused deposit auto-refunded on close.

Recipient wallet: 0xfaad4f22fc6259646c8925203a04020e5458da6d
Currency: USDC on Tempo (0x20c000000000000000000000b9537d11c60e8b50)
Chain: Tempo mainnet (chain ID 4217)
